assessments.title: Intelligence gaps: 7 blind spots active
assessments.analysis: 7 sources returned no data: gdelt, metaculus, acled, ioda, fred, safecast, eia. IODA (internet outage) data unavailable.cannot detect blackouts that precede political crises. These gaps reduce confidence in all other assessments that would cross-reference these sources.
hypotheses: GDELT gap: No global news feed = blind to breaking events. Cannot cross-reference military or economic signals with news coverage.
FRED gap: No economic indicators = cannot confirm or deny recession/inflation signals from commodity moves.
watch_for: If multiple sources fail simultaneously, check if it's network-wide (your connection) vs source-specific (their API)
Prolonged GDELT outage = check alternative news APIs
